body.summary:
WALK of journey `execute-pendingstests` ("A developer executes a script and confirms the pending run completes"). Arc = 3 steps crossing 2 features: scripts (open/save a runnable script ‚Üí produces scriptPath) ‚Üí runs-and-jobs (Run ‚Üí produces jobId) ‚Üí runs-and-jobs (runs history confirms that run completed). Entry = real-provider, already grounded and reusable; NO product bug, NO setup gap. The whole arc is a happy-path SUBSET of the already-verified `dev-onboards-script-to-schedule` journey plus flows R01 (run-script-from-run-page) and R02 (completed-run-in-runs-history), all authored/passing on the same build ‚Äî so every screen's vocabulary below is grounded from those passing specs, and I additionally live-confirmed the execution engine end-to-end against the running backend.

LIVE CONFIRMATION (against real stack): frontend up (localhost:80 & :3000 ‚Üí 200), backend CE v1.736.0 (localhost/api), a worker is running (wk-native, last_ping 2s). Created a no-arg python3 script via API in workspace `admins`, queued it, and it transitioned pending‚ÜíCompletedJob success=true result="hello windmill" in 214ms. The pending‚Üícompleted transition ‚Äî the whole point of this journey ‚Äî works. storageState `e2e/.auth/admin.json` exists (cookie token from auth.setup.ts).

ENTRY (established, NOT walked ‚Äî realness rung 2 real-provider): admin@windmill.dev / changeme; EXISTING workspace `admins` (id=admins, name=Admins, superadmin) ‚Äî it already holds scripts/runs. Reuse via storageState cookie + `page.addInitScript(() => localStorage.setItem('workspace','admins'))` then navigate. workspaceId='admins' is SUPPLIED by entry, not walked. IMPORTANT: this journey uses the pre-existing `admins` workspace and does NOT create a workspace ‚Äî so the sibling SG-workspace-cap gap (CE caps user workspaces at 2, blocks workspace CREATION) is IRRELEVANT here, and SG01-windmill-stack-not-booted is satisfied (stack up). No setup gap applies.

STEP 1 ‚Äî script-editor (feature: scripts) ‚Äî WALK at level 1, do NOT API-create (that is the flow shortcut, illegal for a claimed journey step). Grounded UI path (from dev-onboards): from Home, click the `^Script$` CTA (link or button) ‚Üí lands `/scripts/edit/u/admin(%40|@windmill.dev)?/draft_...`. Select the `^Python$` language tile. Replace the Monaco body with a NO-ARG body `def main():\n    return 'hello windmill'` ‚Äî drive Monaco via `window.monaco` getEditors() fast-path, else fallback `page.getByRole('textbox',{name:'Editor content'}).first()` + Ctrl+A/Delete/type. Wait for `[aria-label="Autosave status"]` to read `Saved`. Deploy via `page.getByRole('button',{name:/^Deploy$/}).dispatchEvent('click')` ‚Äî a portal tooltip overlays Deploy and swallows normal/force clicks, so dispatchEvent is REQUIRED. Lands `/scripts/get/<id>` where id is EITHER a hash `[a-f0-9]{8,}` OR a path `u/admin/<name>`. produces: scriptPath = decodeURIComponent(pathname after `/scripts/get/`).

STEP 2 ‚Äî run-page (feature: runs-and-jobs) ‚Äî consumes scriptPath, produces jobId. On `/scripts/get/<path>` the auto-generated RunForm shows a Run button `getByRole('button',{name:/^Run(?:\b|$|\s)/}).first()`. For a no-arg body it is ENABLED immediately (there are NO args to fill). Click ‚Üí navigates `/run/<jobId>`; jobId = pathname after `/run/` split on `/`. Job-detail page: h1 is the literal `run/<jobId>`; success is shown as on-screen text `Success` PLUS a result panel rendering the return value (`hello windmill`). This job-detail page is where the pending‚Üírunning‚ÜíSuccess transition is directly observable.

STEP 3 ‚Äî runs-history (feature: runs-and-jobs) ‚Äî consumes jobId (and/or scriptPath). Navigate `/runs`, heading `^Runs$`. Confirm OUR previously-pending run now shows successful completion.

The spec is directionally correct; reconcile these divergences and shared-workspace scoping into it. Advance walk‚Üídone: no blocker to record, no setup-gap to (re)open.
vocabulary: Home CTA: link/button with accessible name `^Script$` opens the script editor
Monaco body editor: role=textbox name='Editor content' (or window.monaco.editor.getEditors())
Autosave status widget: [aria-label="Autosave status"] shows `Saved` when persisted
Deploy button: `^Deploy$` ‚Äî MUST be triggered via dispatchEvent('click') (portal tooltip overlay)
Script detail URL: /scripts/get/<id> where id = hash [a-f0-9]{8,} OR path u/admin/<name>
Run button on auto-generated RunForm: `^Run(?:\b|$|\s)` ‚Äî enabled immediately for a no-arg script
Job success signal (job-detail): on-screen text `Success` + result panel renders the return value
Runs list row: `See run detail` link -> /run/<jobId>; completed run shown as green status icon + text `Ended ‚Ä¶ ago` (regex /Ended\s+\d+\w+\s+ago/i)
Runs list does NOT print the literal word `Success` ‚Äî success is icon + `Ended ‚Ä¶ ago`, absence of Error/Failure
API: POST /api/w/admins/jobs/run/p/<scriptPath> returns raw jobId (404 'script not found' immediately after create ‚Äî retry w/ backoff)
API: GET /api/w/admins/jobs_u/get/<jobId> returns {type:'QueuedJob'} while pending, {type:'CompletedJob',success:true,result} when done
body.flow: Real happy-path flow (grounded from passing dev-onboards journey + R01/R02 flows, execution engine live-confirmed): ENTRY establishes admin auth + existing `admins` workspace via storageState cookie + localStorage.workspace='admins' (rung 2, not walked). STEP 1 (scripts): Home ‚Üí click `^Script$` ‚Üí script editor (/scripts/edit/.../draft_) ‚Üí pick `^Python$` tile ‚Üí type no-arg body `def main(): return 'hello windmill'` into Monaco ‚Üí wait Autosave `Saved` ‚Üí Deploy (dispatchEvent) ‚Üí lands /scripts/get/<hash|path> ‚áí produces scriptPath. STEP 2 (runs-and-jobs): on the script-detail RunForm click Run (`^Run\b`, enabled ‚Äî no args) ‚Üí navigates /run/<jobId>; job-detail (h1 `run/<jobId>`) shows the run go pending‚Üí`Success` with result `hello windmill` ‚áí consumes scriptPath, produces jobId. STEP 3 (runs-and-jobs): open /runs (heading `Runs`) and confirm OUR run (matched by scriptPath/slug substring, e.g. getByText(new RegExp(slug))) shows a completed row ‚Äî green status icon + `Ended ‚Ä¶ ago`, no Error/Failure ‚Äî and/or assert Success on /run/<jobId> directly ‚áí consumes jobId. State accretes scriptPath‚ÜíjobId across the scripts‚Üíruns-and-jobs boundary, proving the produces‚Üíconsumes chain.
divergences: SPEC step 2 says 'fill any required arguments' ‚Äî reality: the grounded happy path uses a NO-ARG script (def main(): return ...), so there are NO arguments to fill and the Run button is enabled immediately. An arg-filling variant would require a script with a `main(x)` parameter; keep the happy-path journey no-arg (matches dev-onboards + R01). Author should soften 'fill any required arguments' to 'submit the auto-generated Run form (no args required for the happy-path script)'.

SPEC step 3 says 'confirm the pending run now shows a successful completion' but the /runs LIST view does NOT render the literal word 'Success'. A completed run = green status icon + `Ended ‚Ä¶ ago` timestamp (regex /Ended\s+\d+\w+\s+ago/i) with no Error/Failure token. The literal `Success` text only appears on the /run/<jobId> job-detail page. Author must assert accordingly.

CRITICAL shared-workspace scoping: unlike dev-onboards (which runs in a brand-new EMPTY workspace where the first /runs row is guaranteed to be its own), this journey runs in the pre-existing `admins` workspace that already contains MANY scripts/runs. The dev-onboards `getByText(/Ended‚Ä¶ago/).first()` trick is UNSAFE here ‚Äî it could match a foreign run. Step 3 MUST scope to OUR run: match on the script path/slug substring (like R02: getByText(new RegExp(slug))) OR navigate directly to /run/<jobId> and assert `Success` there. The step already consumes jobId ‚Äî use it.

STEP 1 realness: R01/R02 CREATE the script via API and only walk the run/runs screens ‚Äî that is fine for a single-feature FLOW but ILLEGAL for a JOURNEY's claimed step. For this journey step 1 (feature scripts) must be WALKED through the editor UI at level 1 (as dev-onboards does), not API-seeded. Do not copy R01/R02's createScriptViaApi shortcut into the journey.

ALTITUDE note (for the reconcile/author to weigh, not a walk blocker): this journey crosses only 2 features (scripts‚Üíruns-and-jobs) and is a strict happy-path SUBSET of the already-verified `dev-onboards-script-to-schedule` journey (which walks script‚Üírun‚Üíschedule‚Üíruns). The produces‚Üíconsumes chain (scriptPath‚ÜíjobId) is genuine, so it clears the L0 bar minimally, but it is close to the over-split smell ‚Äî the spec owner may prefer to keep it as flows R01+R02 under runs-and-jobs. Flagging per methodology; keeping walk as-authored since that is a spec decision, not a walk finding.
